message:
🐛 Use waldorf runner label for CKS nightly workflows (#27)

Change runs-on to [self-hosted, linux, waldorf] to target the
waldorf CKS cluster for nightly E2E tests.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -127,7 +127,7 @@ on:
 
 jobs:
   nightly-e2e:
-    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, cks]
+    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, waldorf]
     env:
       GUIDE_NAME: ${{ inputs.guide_name }}
       GUIDE_PATH: ${{ inputs.guide_path || format('guides/{0}', inputs.guide_name) }}
